data.body: eba0 CLOSED (change555 green). 18/19 closed. 5f39 review rounds 3-5 all BLOCK on exact reconcile-bridge.yml workflow replication + canary threshold. Round6: specified cron 0 6 * * 1, JIRA_URL/USER=vars TOKEN=secret, acli symlink-to-/usr/local/bin+auth, refined canary threshold (fail iff >=1 prereq-skip AND 0 credential-gated live executed, excluding always-on guards). Only 5f39 left.
